name: personal-reminder-agent
description: Monorepo for a React + Node personal reminder agent.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx firebase-tools deploy --config firebase.spark.json --only hosting,firestore:rules --project echo-96caa
scripts.deploy:full: npm run build && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting,functions --project echo-96caa
